concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: The output fails to preserve the specific approval date of the minutes ('August 23, 2019') which appears in both the red watermark ('APPROVED BY NC 911 BOARD 08/23/19') and the document footer ('Approved August 23, 2019'). While the metadata title mentions the document status as 'Approved', the precise date information is missing from the converted text elements, representing a loss of document metadata present in the source.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: NC 911 Board Minutes for August 14, 2019, as Approved August 23, 2019

concerns.analysis: The lists of attendees (under 'Members Present', 'Members Absent', and 'Staff Present') are incorrectly converted. Instead of being structured as proper list elements with individual items, the entire contents of these lists are merged into single paragraph strings using newline characters. This degrades the structural semantic meaning of the list items.
